name: Water Pressure Calculator
seo_description: Water Pressure Calculator. Column height, Friction losses (%) — get Gross pressure, Net pressure, PSI instantly for your plumbing and water systems.
example_label: Calculate water pressure for a 15m column height with 15% friction losses.

range_hints.altura_m: Height from pump/tank to highest point
range_hints.perdidas_carga_pct: Typical losses: 10-25% depending on pipe length and diameter

result_context: For {altura_m}m height with {perdidas_carga_pct}% losses: {bar_bruto} bar gross, {bar_neto} bar net, {psi} PSI, {kpa} kPa.
formula_display: Pressure in bar = Height(m) x 0.0981; Net = Gross x (1 - Loss%)
steps: Convert height a pressure: 15m = 1.5 bar (10m = 1 bar)
Estimar power of bomba according to flow rate requerido
mistakes: No Consider pérdidas per fricción in tuberías largas
Dimensionar bomba solo per height (ignorar flow rate necessary)
No prever vaso of expansión to evitar arranques frecuentes
description: Water Pressure Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
desc: Water Pressure Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
